'''鈭歞h-p-m''' ('''dhapama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valorize|valorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valorize|valorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-m
|-
! Lemma
| dhapama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapamithi|dhapamithi]] || [[word:dhapamiji|dhapamiji]] || [[word:dhapamishi|dhapamishi]] || [[word:dhapami|dhapami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapamuthuth|dhapamuthuth]] || [[word:dhapamujuj|dhapamujuj]] || [[word:dhapamushush|dhapamushush]] || [[word:dhapam|dhapam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapamuthu|dhapamuthu]] || [[word:dhapamuju|dhapamuju]] || [[word:dhapamushu|dhapamushu]] || [[word:dhapamu|dhapamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapamufuth|dhapamufuth]] || [[word:dhapamufuj|dhapamufuj]] || [[word:dhapamufush|dhapamufush]] || [[word:dhapamuf|dhapamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapamethe|dhapamethe]] || [[word:dhapameje|dhapameje]] || [[word:dhapameshe|dhapameshe]] || [[word:dhapame|dhapame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapamothoth|dhapamothoth]] || [[word:dhapamojoj|dhapamojoj]] || [[word:dhapamoshosh|dhapamoshosh]] || [[word:dhapam|dhapam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapamotho|dhapamotho]] || [[word:dhapamojo|dhapamojo]] || [[word:dhapamosho|dhapamosho]] || [[word:dhapamo|dhapamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapamofoth|dhapamofoth]] || [[word:dhapamofoj|dhapamofoj]] || [[word:dhapamofosh|dhapamofosh]] || [[word:dhapamof|dhapamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapam忙th忙|dhapam忙th忙]] || [[word:dhapam忙j忙|dhapam忙j忙]] || [[word:dhapam忙sh忙|dhapam忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhapam忙|dhapam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapamathath|dhapamathath]] || [[word:dhapamajaj|dhapamajaj]] || [[word:dhapamashash|dhapamashash]] || [[word:dhapam|dhapam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapamatha|dhapamatha]] || [[word:dhapamaja|dhapamaja]] || [[word:dhapamasha|dhapamasha]] || [[word:dhapama|dhapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapamafath|dhapamafath]] || [[word:dhapamafaj|dhapamafaj]] || [[word:dhapamafash|dhapamafash]] || [[word:dhapamaf|dhapamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhapamasha|dhapamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhapamasha|godhapamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhapamasha|gokidhapamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhapamn眉sha|dhapamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhapamnkn眉sha|godhapamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapamn眉sha|gokidhapamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhapamsh毛sha|dhapamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhapamnksh毛sha|godhapamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhapamsh毛sha|gokidhapamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapamrosha|dhapamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapamnkrosha|godhapamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapamrosha|gokidhapamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapamusha|dhapamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapamnkmusha|godhapamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapamusha|gokidhapamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhapamsherasha|dhapamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhapamnksherasha|godhapamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhapamsherasha|gokidhapamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhapamngasha|dhapamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhapamnkngasha|godhapamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhapamngasha|gokidhapamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhapamyasha|dhapamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhapamnkyasha|godhapamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhapamyasha|gokidhapamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhapamyamasha|dhapamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhapamnkyamasha|godhapamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhapamyamasha|gokidhapamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapamn眉sh毛sha|dhapamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapamnkn眉sh毛sha|godhapamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapamn眉sh毛sha|gokidhapamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapamn眉rosha|dhapamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapamnkn眉rosha|godhapamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapamn眉rosha|gokidhapamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapamn眉musha|dhapamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapamnkn眉musha|godhapamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapamn眉musha|gokidhapamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapamsh毛n眉sha|dhapamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapamnksh毛n眉sha|godhapamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapamsh毛n眉sha|gokidhapamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapamsh毛rosha|dhapamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapamnksh毛rosha|godhapamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapamsh毛rosha|gokidhapamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapamsh毛musha|dhapamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapamnksh毛musha|godhapamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapamsh毛musha|gokidhapamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapamron眉sha|dhapamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapamnkron眉sha|godhapamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapamron眉sha|gokidhapamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapamrosh毛sha|dhapamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapamnkrosh毛sha|godhapamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapamrosh毛sha|gokidhapamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapamromusha|dhapamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapamnkromusha|godhapamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapamromusha|gokidhapamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapamun眉sha|dhapamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapamnkmun眉sha|godhapamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapamun眉sha|gokidhapamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapamush毛sha|dhapamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapamnkmush毛sha|godhapamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapamush毛sha|gokidhapamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapamurosha|dhapamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapamnkmurosha|godhapamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapamurosha|gokidhapamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhapam|dhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙p忙m|dh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhapam|hodhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙p忙m|hodh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhapam|hohodhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙p忙m|hohodh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhapam|n眉dhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙p忙m|n眉dh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhapam|n眉n眉dhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙p忙m|n眉n眉dh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhapam|n茂dhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙p忙m|n茂dh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhapam|n茂n茂dhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙p忙m|n茂n茂dh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhapam|ludhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙p忙m|ludh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhapam|luludhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙p忙m|luludh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhapam|lidhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙p忙m|lidh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhapam|lilidhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙p忙m|lilidh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhapam|kodhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙p忙m|kodh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhapam|kokodhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙p忙m|kokodh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhapam|kedhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙p忙m|kedh忙p忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhapam|kekedhapam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙p忙m|kekedh忙p忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
